query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale_attivi,
  SUM(CASE WHEN channels IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as senza_canali,
  SUM(CASE WHEN channels IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_canali
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active';
